allow: Bash(python -c "import pypdf, pytesseract, docx, pptx, PIL, fitz; print\('all heavy deps import OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import pptx,docx,fitz; print\('python-pptx',pptx.__version__\); print\('python-docx',docx.__version__\); print\('pymupdf',fitz.__doc__ and fitz.VersionBind if hasattr\(fitz,'VersionBind'\) else 'n/a'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('musaid_ist.db'\); print\([r[0] for r in c.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('musaid_ist.db'\); [print\(r[0]+';'\) for r in c.execute\(\\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%'\\"\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('musaid_ist.db'\); [print\(t, c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM '+t\).fetchone\(\)[0]\) for t in ['departments','teachers','subjects','course_structure','handouts','notes']]")
Bash(python -c "import importlib.metadata as m; print\('SQLAlchemy', m.version\('SQLAlchemy'\)\); print\('PyMySQL', m.version\('PyMySQL'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; a=sqlite3.connect\('musaid_ist.db'\); b=sqlite3.connect\('musaid_ist.backup.db'\); ta=sum\(a.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM '+t\).fetchone\(\)[0] for t in ['departments','subjects','teachers','course_structure','handouts','notes']\); tb=sum\(b.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM '+t\).fetchone\(\)[0] for t in ['departments','subjects','teachers','course_structure','handouts','notes']\); print\('live total',ta,'backup total',tb,'MATCH' if ta==tb else 'MISMATCH'\)")
